page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of CMNS-Physics department.

Restriction: Must be in a major within CMNS-Physics department. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

PHYS398 Independent Studies Seminar (1-16 Credits) Credit according to work done. Enrollment is limited to students admitted to the independent studies program in physics.

PHYS399 Special Problems in Physics (1-3 Credits) Selected advanced experiments. (Will be given with sufficient demand.) Prerequisite: PHYS405; and permission of CMNS-Physics department.
